name: Blaine's Venison Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the venison, pork, and hot water until well mixed.
2. Add spices and honey to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
This is probably my favorite recipe despite evolving significantly over the past 5 years. A couple of years ago, my father mistakenly calculated the spices in tablespoons instead of teaspoons, resulting in a batch that was better than the previous one written above. The next year, we increased the amount of black pepper, which made it even more flavorful. If you enjoy spice and believe that a little spice enhances sausage, feel free to adjust the mixture accordingly. I will be adding a small amount of cajun pepper mix to a 20 lb test batch of sausage this weekend.
